title: Salesforce dev-tool batch plan
description: Agent-authored plan of sandbox dev-tool operations awaiting one human approval. A named human approves it via scripts/approve_dev_tool_batch.py (human-terminal-only), producing a hash-pinned single-use receipt the safety hook honors instead of per-invocation asks.

tool.description: Bare dev-tool name exactly as the hook classifies it. Deploy/retrieve stay sandbox-scoped by the hook's own path checks; nothing here can widen them.

arguments.description: Exact tool arguments; the hook allows only a byte-identical call (canonical-JSON digest match).
